channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Approximately 11 Chalcome Road: lots of broken wood., 20th April
item.description:
Wood is outside house is this cul de sac next to green area that leads to Eynsham Drive.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eynsham Drive, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown Weeds, 20th April
item.description:
The weeds and nettles need cut back on the path between magpie hall lane and trinity primary.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cottage Avenue, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping rubbish, 20th April
item.description:
Contact fly tipping area, always full of rubbish and is attracting rats
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arcola Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several orange bags on pavement for several days, 20th April
item.description:
These orange bagses have been broken into probably by foxes and some of the contents are spilling over the pavement. I saw them here on Saturday as well.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31-39, Norwood Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent obstruction to resident parking bay, 20th April
item.description:
For over 6 months, contractors working on no.76 Adys Road have blocked a resident parking bay with rubble and bins. Not only does this take up a space in resident parking, which residents pay an annual fee to access, but it also leaves potentially damaging waste materials on roads.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Adys Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter picking needed, 20th April
item.description:
Rubbish outside the bins that appears to be opened by rodents overnight has been scattered all over and need picking up.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Long Walk, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement, 20th April
item.description:
Overflowing public bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Seats, 20th April
item.description:
Resident would like to know if a couple seats can be placed in Stonham Park. Please can we call back to advise.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Medway Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on post box, 20th April
item.description:
Unable to report to Royal Mail as a member of the public

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 20th April
item.description:
Lots of wastage that is attracting pest and foxes in the area, not safe and hygenic issues
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alderwood Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Burned Vehicle, 20th April
item.description:
There is a dismantled and abandoned vehicle REG DJ51GMA located in a rear service access behind residential properties. The vehicle appears not roadworthy and has been stationary for an extended period. It is partially stripped and surrounded by debris. Its position is obstructing access within the service area, including near a side exit from the building, which raises safety and access concerns for residents. The condition of the vehicle and its location are also contributing to further dumping and general deterioration of the area. Request inspection and removal as a priority

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 153, Newlands Park, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Markings, 20th April
item.description:
The road markings have been re-drawn in our street today. But where there use to be a double yellow line around the grass area on Longmead Drive there is a single yellow line now. Is this a permanent change to the parking/ road markings in Longmead Drive?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Longmead Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 21 Carlisle Road, 20th April
item.description:
Needs pruning. Overhangs disabled bay.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carlisle Road, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glazebrook Close, Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: No through road-sign missing., 20th April
item.description:
The sign mounted at the top of the pole went missing in the last storm with high winds.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Esher Close, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black Sack, 20th April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 20/04/26 08:30 Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.4274037, 0.042734 what3words - fence.plant.jeeps Nearest address - 212 Court Farm Road, Mottingham, London, SE9 4JS Flytipped black bag. Please remove Reference - 5503752 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 20/04/2026 08:29 Flytipped black bag. Please remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castleton Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
